name: claudeskills
description: A small marketplace of Claude Code plugins built around real production workflows. Currently ships powerapps-codeapp-setup (Power Apps Code App scaffolding) with more to come.

plugins.name: powerapps-codeapp-setup
plugins.description: Scaffold and deploy Power Apps Code Apps (React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind) with SharePoint / Office 365 Users / Outlook connectors. Encodes the silent-failure gotchas around SharePoint Choice and Person field writes.
